frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 — SC Family
frameworks.description: The SC family provides controls for protecting system communications and information at rest, in transit, and during processing. Covers cryptographic protection, transmission confidentiality, and boundary protection.

frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-171 Rev. 2
frameworks.description: Security requirements for protecting CUI in nonfederal systems. The Media Protection and System & Communications Protection families are most relevant to data protection.

frameworks.name: PCI DSS v4.0
frameworks.fullName: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
frameworks.description: Requirements for protecting cardholder data (CHD) and sensitive authentication data (SAD). Requirements 3, 4, 9, and 12 are most directly relevant to data protection.

frameworks.name: ISO 27001:2022 Annex A.8
frameworks.description: Annex A.8 of ISO 27001:2022 covers technological controls including endpoint security, privileged access, information classification restrictions, data masking, DLP, and cryptography.
